exemplar.title: How and to what effect does Rooney use literary devices to explore differing responses to trauma?

detailedExemplarData.title: How and to what effect does Rooney use literary devices to explore differing responses to trauma?

subject.title: English A Lit
subject.description:
**IB English A Literature** is a **Group 1** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **literary texts from diverse cultures, genres, and time periods**, with a strong focus on **critical analysis, interpretation, and understanding of how literature reflects and shapes human experience through themes, cultural contexts, and global issues**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Unseen literary text analysis | 1h 15m | 2h 15m | 35% |
| **Paper 2** | Comparative essay on studied works | 1h 45m | 1h 45m | 40% |
| **Individual Oral** | Oral presentation on global issues | 10 minutes | 10 minutes | 25% |

strengths: The research question is clearly stated, focused and consistently guides the analysis throughout the essay.
The methodology is complete, employing close reading alongside a psychoanalytic framework supported by a suitable range of secondary sources.
The topic is communicated effectively with clear purpose and contextual framing in both introduction and conclusion.
weaknesses: The scope of âliterary devicesâ remains broad, leading to occasional drift into thematic commentary rather than tight analytical focus.
Methodological justification could be strengthened with more explicit rationale for source selection and analytical procedures.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The investigation communicates its topic and purpose accurately, maintains a focused research question, and uses an appropriately detailed methodology. Minor issuesâsuch as occasional scope drift and under-explained selection criteriaâprevent the work from reaching the highest band, but overall performance aligns with a high mid-band score of 5 out of 6.

strengths: Demonstrates coherent and detailed knowledge of the primary text through judicious quotation and plot reference.
Uses subject-specific terminology consistently and accurately, including literary and psychoanalytic concepts.
Effectively integrates secondary scholarship to support interpretive claims, showing nuanced contextual understanding.
weaknesses: Occasional over-reliance on plot summary in the introduction detracts from immediate analytical focus.
A few terms (e.g. âminimalist proseâ) are applied loosely and would benefit from more precise stylistic definition.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay displays a strong command of literary knowledge and concepts, using sources effectively and sustaining accurate terminology. While a slight reduction in narrative summary and occasional looseness in a few terms prevent a top-band mark, overall work merits a robust 5 out of 6.

strengths: Research draws on a broad range of relevant critical voices and theoretical texts, consistently informing the discussion.
Analysis is deep and well-structured, connecting textual evidence to broader critical perspectives with persuasive insight.
Argument development is coherent, with clear linkage between literary techniques and charactersâ trauma responses.
weaknesses: Evaluation of alternative interpretations and critical sources is somewhat limited, with occasional assertions lacking fully nuanced substantiation.
Engagement with some secondary quotations remains descriptive rather than critically interrogative, reducing evaluative depth.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The investigation presents excellent critical thinking: research is highly relevant, analysis is sophisticated, and arguments are well supported. Despite minor gaps in source evaluation and nuanced discussion of counter-claims, the overall performance sits securely in the upper band, warranting 10 out of 12.

strengths: All structural requirements of the extended essay are met with a clear title page, contents, sectional headings, and complete works-cited list.
Layout and formatting are consistent and reader-friendly, with correct citations, pagination, and adherence to word-limit conventions.
MLA style referencing is applied accurately throughout, and the table of contents enhances navigability.
weaknesses: A few minor typographical slips and an uncited reference on a standalone page should be addressed to achieve flawless presentation.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Presentation fully satisfies IB requirements: the structure is logical, the formatting is precise, and referencing is consistent. Only the smallest typographical and citation cohesion issues remain, supporting the top-band score of 4 out of 4.

strandSelections.reasoning: The methodologyâclose literary analysis supported by secondary criticism and a psychoanalytic lensâis **mostly complete and appropriate**. The student organises the discussion around three literary features, cites a range of critical voices, and provides accurate references with a works-cited list. Evidence of informed source selection is present but not always well integrated; some critical quotations are descriptive rather than analytical, and the rationale for the psychoanalytic frame is asserted more than demonstrated. Consequently, the approach is **generally sound yet not consistently effective**, fitting the 3â4 band.

The layout is neat and reader-friendly: consistent font and spacing, correct in-text citations, numbered pages, and an accurate word count below 4,000 words. MLA-style referencing appears consistent, and visual elements (table of contents) are well formatted. While minor typographical slips exist, **overall formatting meets IB requirements effectively**, warranting the highest band for this strand.

Research includes a range of critical articles, theoretical works (psychoanalysis, trauma studies), and the primary text. **Most sources are clearly relevant** to the research question, and citations are correctly formatted. Nonetheless, the depth of engagement with scholarship varies; some references function more as rhetorical support than as integrated dialogue with the studentâs argument. Coverage is therefore **good but not consistently excellent**, meriting the upper end of the 4â6 band.

The topicâRooneyâs use of literary devices to depict contrasting responses to trauma in *Normal People*âis stated explicitly in the title and reiterated in the introduction. The student provides **sufficient contextual framing** (Rooneyâs background, thematic rationale) and outlines the main literary elements to be examined (characterisation, setting, structure). While the purpose is clear, the phrasing is occasionally wordy and the scope (âliterary devicesâ in general) could be narrowed for sharper focus. Overall, communication is **adequately clear and purposeful**, aligning with the 3â4 band.

A coherent line of argument is sustained, culminating in a conclusion that synthesises main findings. The student **does discuss implications** for understanding trauma and gender, but evaluation of sources and alternative interpretations is limited, and some claims remain asserted rather than critically weighed. The discussion shows good development yet stops short of the consistently critical engagement expected in higher bands, fitting comfortably within the 4â6 range.

The analysis moves beyond description by tracing how specific literary techniques construct distinct traumatic responses, and it frequently links textual evidence to broader critical perspectives. **Insights into characterisation, setting, and narrative form demonstrate depth**, and the student attempts a psychoanalytic interpretation. However, reasoning occasionally becomes repetitive, and some assertions (e.g., gendered generalisations about trauma) lack nuanced substantiation. Support for claims is usually present but not uniformly rigorous, positioning the work at the lower edge of the 7â9 band with a score of 7.

The essay follows IB EE conventions: title page with research question and word count, structured table of contents, clear section headers, logical progression from introduction through body sections to conclusion, and a complete works-cited list. **All required structural elements are present and appropriately organised**, justifying placement in the top band for structure.

The essay shows **good knowledge of the primary text** through plentiful quotation and accurate plot reference, and it draws on a reasonable range of secondary sources (critics such as Osborne-Crowley, Lodge, Pierini). These sources are relevant and usually support the line of inquiry, though some are invoked rather than critically engaged with. Occasional over-reliance on plot summary and limited synthesis of scholarship prevent the work from reaching the highest level, but overall understanding is clear and coherent, justifying a score in the 3â4 band.

The student employs **appropriate literary terminology**âe.g. âdirect/indirect/dynamic characterisation,â âsemantic field,â âstream of consciousness,â âfragmented narrativeââand deploys psychoanalytic concepts such as trauma and coping mechanisms with mostly accurate understanding. A few terms are applied loosely (e.g., conflating âminimalist proseâ with âsimplicityâ without deeper stylistic analysis), but usage is generally correct and consistent. This sustained, if not flawless, command of subject-specific language aligns with the 3â4 band.

The research questionââHow and to what effect does Rooney use literary devices to explore differing responses to trauma?ââis **clearly stated and remains visible throughout** the essay. The student returns to it in section headings and in the conclusion, demonstrating connection to the ensuing discussion. However, the phrase âliterary devicesâ remains broad, and at times the analysis drifts into thematic commentary rather than tightly anchoring each section to the research question. This places the work solidly in the **clear but partially focused** category, meriting a mid-band score.

annotations.comment: The introduction leans heavily on plot summary, which detracts from analytical focus. Condensing narrative description and foregrounding analysis would sharpen the essayâs knowledge and understanding of literary critique.

The methodology paragraph outlines close reading and psychoanalytic framing but lacks details on source selection criteria and analytical procedures. Elaborate on how you chose and applied your methods to strengthen Focus and Method.
The link between Connellâs class background and social anxiety effectively enriches character analysis, demonstrating nuanced understanding of socio-economic context.
Attribution to âSucholdolskiâ conflicts with the Donohue citation in the bibliography. Verify author names and ensure consistency to maintain scholarly rigour in Critical Thinking.
The clear section header for âSettingâ guides the reader through the structural progression, reinforcing a coherent organizational flow.
The transition to coping mechanisms in the university paragraph lacks a clear topic sentence. Add signposting to improve the logical flow of argument.
The conclusion synthesises the main findings and revisits the research question effectively, providing coherent closure and reinforcing the investigationâs focus.
The Works Cited list is comprehensive and consistently formatted in MLA style, reflecting careful attention to referencing conventions and Presentation standards.
The word count is provided and remains under 4,000 words, meeting IB formatting requirements and demonstrating adherence to formal constraints.
The phrase âborder understandingâ appears without explanation. Clarify this concept or remove it to avoid introducing unsupported ideas in the conclusion.
The indirect characterisation of Marianneâs eating habits is well chosen, clearly linking textual detail to trauma coping mechanisms and demonstrating coherent use of sources.
The title clearly communicates the investigationâs focus on trauma and relationships, establishing purpose and engaging the reader. This aligns with effective structure and clarity in Presentation.
The research question is clearly stated at the outset, maintaining visibility and guiding the analysis throughout the essay. This strong question focus supports a coherent investigation.
The claim that gender differences shape coping mechanisms is asserted without sufficient nuance. Provide empirical support or qualify this claim to enhance analytical depth.
An additional reference appears on its own page; ensure this entry is cited in the text or merged appropriately into the main bibliography to maintain cohesiveness.
The table of contents is well structured with clear section titles and page references, enhancing navigability and reinforcing logical organization.

The Osborne-Crowley quotation is introduced descriptively but not critically engaged. To deepen critical thinking, integrate commentary on how this source directly informs your argument rather than summarizing its claim.
Integrating David Lodgeâs insight on interior monologue strengthens your discussion of narrative technique, showing good research relevance and critical engagement.
The paragraph on non-linear storytelling introduces Perini and Lodge but stops abruptly. Fully integrate and explain these theoretical points to reinforce your analytical thread.
Effective use of the term âdirect characterisationâ demonstrates accurate deployment of literary terminology to structure analysis, reflecting solid Knowledge and Understanding.
Bringing in multiple critics (Castillo, Powell, Yang) to chart dynamic character growth shows excellent research breadth and supports a multidimensional critical discussion.
The discussion of Connellâs bedroom symbol repeats earlier points. Condense repetitive phrasing to maintain focus on analytical insight rather than restating observations.
The analysis of university as both a site of growth and alienation is insightful, linking setting to charactersâ trauma responses with depth and relevance.
Your comprehensive examination of point of view and internal monologue shows insightful command of narrative concepts and advanced conceptual understanding.
The âFragmented Narrative Structureâ heading effectively signals a shift in focus, aiding reader orientation and strengthening the essayâs overall structure.
The discussion of SarÄ±kaya-Åenâs argument is brief; expanding your engagement with this source will deepen methodological justification and critical analysis.
The analysis of minimalist prose effectively connects stylistic simplicity to the portrayal of trauma, demonstrating thorough and coherent critical thinking.
